name: MAL1_chrVII
description: MAL1 locus in chrVII subtelomere; encodes MalR transcription factor (MAL13), maltose permease (MAL11/AGT1), maltase (MAL12). MAL loci are tripartite (regulator + transporter + maltase); paralogs at >90% identity require PSVs.
expected_copy_count: 1 paralog within MAL family (5 paralogs, strain-variable)
